description.content: Generate content using Gemini models with text, image, audio, and video inputs. Supports multimodal prompts, function calling, structured output, and configurable safety settings.

item.name: Google Gemini Generates a model response given an input GenerateContentRequest. Refer to the text generation guide for detailed usage information. Input capabilities differ between models, including tuned models.

request.name: Google Gemini Generates a model response given an input GenerateContentRequest. Refer to the text generation guide for detailed usage information. Input capabilities differ between models, including tuned models.

description.content: Generates a response from the model given an input. The input can include text, images, audio, video, and other multimodal content. The model processes the input according to its capabilities and returns generated content along with safety ratings and usage metadata.

response.name: Successful response with generated content.
Bad request. The request body is malformed or missing required fields.
Unauthorized. Invalid or missing API key.
Forbidden. The API key does not have permission to access the requested model.
Not found. The specified model does not exist.
Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

item.name: Google Gemini Generates a streamed response from the model given an input GenerateContentRequest. Returns a stream of GenerateContentResponse chunks using server-sent events.

request.name: Google Gemini Generates a streamed response from the model given an input GenerateContentRequest. Returns a stream of GenerateContentResponse chunks using server-sent events.

description.content: Generates a streamed response from the model. This endpoint behaves identically to generateContent but returns partial responses incrementally as server-sent events. Each event contains a GenerateContentResponse with one or more candidate content parts. Use the alt=sse query parameter to enable streaming.

query.description: Set to 'sse' for server-sent events streaming.

response.name: Successful streaming response. Returns a stream of GenerateContentResponse objects as server-sent events.
Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

description.content: Generate text embedding vectors for semantic search, classification, clustering, and retrieval tasks using Gemini embedding models.

item.name: Google Gemini Generates a text embedding vector from the input Content using the specified Gemini Embedding model.

request.name: Google Gemini Generates a text embedding vector from the input Content using the specified Gemini Embedding model.

description.content: Generates an embedding from the model given input content. The embedding is a vector representation of the input text that captures semantic meaning. Embeddings can be used for semantic search, text classification, clustering, and retrieval tasks. Only the text parts of the input content are used for embedding generation.

response.name: Successful response with the generated embedding vector.
Unauthorized. Invalid or missing API key.
Not found. The specified model does not exist.
Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

description.content: (Required) The model name to use for embedding. Format: models/{model}. Example: models/gemini-embedding-001.

Google's Gemini API provides access to generative AI models for text generation, multimodal understanding, and embedding creation. The API supports text, image, audio, and video inputs with configurable safety settings, generation parameters, and tool use capabilities.

Contact Support:
